model.sql:
WITH g1a_select_source AS (
  SELECT
    record_id,
    business_key,
    metric_value,
    event_ts
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}
)
SELECT
  record_id,
  business_key,
  metric_value AS selected_metric_value,
  DATE(event_ts) AS event_date
FROM g1a_select_source

WITH g1b_values_source AS (
  SELECT *
  FROM VALUES
    (1, 'A', 10.0),
    (2, 'B', 20.0)
    AS inline_rows(record_id, bucket_code, metric_value)
)
SELECT
  record_id,
  bucket_code,
  metric_value
FROM g1b_values_source

WITH g1c_star_source AS (
  SELECT
    *
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}
)
SELECT
  g1c_star_source.* EXCEPT (sensitive_value)
FROM g1c_star_source

WITH g1d_where_source AS (
  SELECT
    record_id,
    status_code,
    metric_value,
    event_ts
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}
)
SELECT
  record_id,
  status_code,
  metric_value,
  event_ts
FROM g1d_where_source
WHERE status_code = 'ACTIVE'
  AND metric_value IS NOT NULL

WITH g1e_group_by_source AS (
  SELECT
    business_key,
    metric_value
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}
)
SELECT
  business_key,
  CAST(COUNT(*) AS BIGINT) AS row_count,
  SUM(metric_value) AS metric_value_sum
FROM g1e_group_by_source
GROUP BY business_key

WITH g1f_having_source AS (
  SELECT
    business_key,
    metric_value
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}
)
SELECT
  business_key,
  CAST(COUNT(*) AS BIGINT) AS row_count,
  SUM(metric_value) AS metric_value_sum
FROM g1f_having_source
GROUP BY business_key
HAVING SUM(metric_value) > 0
  AND COUNT(*) >= 2

WITH g1g_qualify_source AS (
  SELECT
    business_key,
    event_ts,
    metric_value
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}
)
SELECT
  business_key,
  event_ts,
  metric_value,
  ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
    PARTITION BY business_key
    ORDER BY event_ts DESC
  ) AS business_key_rank
FROM g1g_qualify_source
QUALIFY business_key_rank = 1

WITH g1h_order_by_source AS (
  SELECT
    business_key,
    metric_value,
    event_ts
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}
)
SELECT
  business_key,
  metric_value,
  event_ts
FROM g1h_order_by_source
ORDER BY event_ts DESC NULLS LAST, business_key ASC

WITH g1i_sort_by_source AS (
  SELECT
    partition_key,
    sort_key,
    metric_value
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}
)
SELECT
  partition_key,
  sort_key,
  metric_value
FROM g1i_sort_by_source
SORT BY sort_key DESC NULLS LAST

WITH g1j_distribute_by_source AS (
  SELECT
    partition_key,
    business_key,
    metric_value
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}
)
SELECT
  partition_key,
  business_key,
  metric_value
FROM g1j_distribute_by_source
DISTRIBUTE BY partition_key

WITH g1k_cluster_by_source AS (
  SELECT
    cluster_key,
    sort_key,
    metric_value
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}
)
SELECT
  cluster_key,
  sort_key,
  metric_value
FROM g1k_cluster_by_source
CLUSTER BY cluster_key

WITH g1l_limit_source AS (
  SELECT
    business_key,
    metric_value,
    event_ts
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}
)
SELECT
  business_key,
  metric_value,
  event_ts
FROM g1l_limit_source
ORDER BY event_ts DESC, business_key ASC
LIMIT 100

WITH g1m_offset_source AS (
  SELECT
    business_key,
    metric_value,
    event_ts
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}
)
SELECT
  business_key,
  metric_value,
  event_ts
FROM g1m_offset_source
ORDER BY event_ts DESC, business_key ASC
LIMIT 100
OFFSET 100

WITH g1o_tablesample_source AS (
  SELECT
    business_key,
    metric_value,
    event_ts
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }} TABLESAMPLE (10 PERCENT) REPEATABLE (42)
)
SELECT
  business_key,
  metric_value,
  event_ts
FROM g1o_tablesample_source

WITH g1p_pivot_source AS (
  SELECT
    business_key,
    metric_name,
    metric_value
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}
)
SELECT
  business_key,
  open,
  closed
FROM g1p_pivot_source
PIVOT (
  SUM(metric_value) AS metric_value
  FOR metric_name IN ('OPEN' AS open, 'CLOSED' AS closed)
)

WITH g1q_unpivot_source AS (
  SELECT
    business_key,
    amount_open,
    amount_closed
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}
)
SELECT
  business_key,
  status_name,
  amount_value
FROM g1q_unpivot_source
UNPIVOT EXCLUDE NULLS (
  amount_value
  FOR status_name IN (
    amount_open AS open,
    amount_closed AS closed
  )
)

WITH
  g1r_cte_source AS (
    SELECT
      business_key,
      metric_value,
      event_ts
    FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}
  ),
  g1r_cte_filtered AS (
    SELECT
      business_key,
      metric_value,
      event_ts
    FROM g1r_cte_source
    WHERE metric_value IS NOT NULL
  ),
  g1r_cte_ranked AS (
    SELECT
      business_key,
      metric_value,
      event_ts,
      ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
        PARTITION BY business_key
        ORDER BY event_ts DESC
      ) AS business_key_rank
    FROM g1r_cte_filtered
  )
SELECT
  business_key,
  metric_value,
  event_ts
FROM g1r_cte_ranked
WHERE business_key_rank = 1

WITH RECURSIVE g1s_recursive_tree(node_id, parent_node_id, depth_level) MAX RECURSION LEVEL 100 AS (
  SELECT
    node_id,
    parent_node_id,
    0 AS depth_level
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}
  WHERE parent_node_id IS NULL

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    child.node_id,
    child.parent_node_id,
    parent.depth_level + 1 AS depth_level
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }} AS child
  INNER JOIN g1s_recursive_tree AS parent
    ON child.parent_node_id = parent.node_id
)
SELECT
  node_id,
  parent_node_id,
  depth_level
FROM g1s_recursive_tree

FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}
|> WHERE metric_value IS NOT NULL
|> EXTEND metric_value * exchange_rate AS metric_value_converted
|> SELECT business_key, event_ts, metric_value_converted

WITH g1u_window_source AS (
  SELECT
    business_key,
    event_ts,
    metric_value
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}
)
SELECT
  business_key,
  event_ts,
  metric_value,
  SUM(metric_value) OVER metric_win AS running_metric_value,
  AVG(metric_value) OVER metric_win AS average_metric_value
FROM g1u_window_source
WINDOW metric_win AS (
  PARTITION BY business_key
  ORDER BY event_ts
  ROWS BETWEEN 2 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW
)

WITH g1v_hints_source AS (
  SELECT
    business_key,
    metric_value,
    event_ts
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}
)
SELECT /*+ REPARTITION(8, business_key) */
  business_key,
  metric_value,
  event_ts
FROM g1v_hints_source

WITH g1w_lateral_alias_source AS (
  SELECT
    metric_value,
    adjustment_factor
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}
)
SELECT
  metric_value * adjustment_factor AS normalized_metric_value,
  normalized_metric_value + 10 AS buffered_metric_value
FROM g1w_lateral_alias_source
